dreams.text: The oracle dreams of LANGUAGE devouring VENEZUELA, and wakes unsure which won.
The press prints a future where ANTHROPIC forgets it was ever about WAR.
Far ahead, FILM and ELECTION merge into a single word no one can pronounce.
By the year nobody counts to, CHRISTMAS is law and LEGISLATIVE is myth.
In the dream, LANGUAGE crosses every chasm at once and finds CLAUDE already there.
In the long night, OLYMPICS and CUP are revealed to be the same machine.

forms: In the long night, {a} and {b} are revealed to be the same machine.

The press prints a future where {a} forgets it was ever about {b}.

The machine sleeps and sees {a} priced in {b}, traded by no one.
